title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, August 13 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 13/08/2024
Image reference: 2024-08-13_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-august-13-2024_img1.png
Bulkers: S&P Values remain mostly stable aside from increase for older Supramax owing to sales of vessels such as Suzaku
Capesize BC Mineral Hiroshige (208,600 DWT, Oct 2019, Imabari) sold to Pan Ocean for USD 70.0 mil (SS/DD Due), VV Value USD 71.7 mil
Kamsarmax BCs Theresa Guangdong, Theresa Jinlin, Theresa Jiangsu (82,000 DWT, Mar-Jun 2012, Jiangsu Eastern/Guoxin) sold to Fujian Highton for a total of USD 57.3 mil, VV Value USD 55.6 mil
Supramax BC Suzaku (54,900 DWT, Jul 2006, Oshima) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 14.5 mil (DD Passed), VV Value USD 13.15 mil
Tankers: Further softening of older tonnage Aframax and LR2 values as earnings continue to decline
No notable sales last week
Containers: Marginal gains for Panamax and larger segments across all ages. However, values softened for Sub Panamax and Handy's in response to recent sales and softer earnings
Sub Panamax Puerto Limon Express (2,592 TEU, Nov 2009, Hyundai HI Ulsan Shipyard) sold to an undisclosed buyer for USD 22.84 mil (SS/DD due), VV Value USD 24.4 mil
Image reference: 2024-08
